topic.what: Standard internal medicine textbook with comprehensive gastritis and gastropathy chapters.
topic.how: Systematic review of current evidence organized by disease entity.
topic.why_matters: Defines the conventional medicine baseline for gastritis understanding — the benchmark against which all alternative approaches are compared.

characteristics.what_it_measures: Degree of adoption as clinical reference
characteristics.value: Most widely used internal medicine textbook globally

novelty: Comprehensive synthesis of current conventional gastritis knowledge
open_problems: Updated every few years — rapidly outdated
